entries.name: hasSharedHeap
entries.code: hasSharedHeap = false

entries.name: pthreadh
entries.code: pthreadh = "#define _GNU_SOURCE\n#include <pthread.h>"

entries.name: SysThread
entries.code: SysThread {.importc: "pthread_t", header: "<sys/types.h>".} = int

entries.name: Pthread_attr
entries.code: Pthread_attr {.importc: "pthread_attr_t", header: "<sys/types.h>".} = object

entries.name: Timespec
entries.code:
Timespec {.importc: "struct timespec", header: "<time.h>".} = object
  tv_sec*: Time
  tv_nsec*: clong

entries.name: pthread_attr_init
pthread_attr_setstack
pthread_attr_setstacksize
pthread_attr_destroy
pthread_create
pthread_join
pthread_cancel
CpuSet
entries.code:
CpuSet {.importc: "cpu_set_t", header: "#define _GNU_SOURCE\n#include <sched.h>".} = object
  when defined(linux) and defined(amd64):

entries.name: cpusetZero
entries.code:
proc cpusetZero(s: var CpuSet) {.importc: "CPU_ZERO", header: "#define _GNU_SOURCE\n#include <sched.h>",
                                 raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: cpusetIncl
setAffinity
entries.code:
proc setAffinity(thread: SysThread; setsize: csize_t; s: var CpuSet) {.
    importc: "pthread_setaffinity_np",
    header: "#define _GNU_SOURCE\n#include <pthread.h>", raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

entries.name: emulatedThreadVars
entries.code: emulatedThreadVars = false

entries.name: ThreadLocalStorage
entries.code: ThreadLocalStorage = array[0 .. (nimTlsSize div 8), float]

entries.name: PGcThread
entries.code: PGcThread = ptr GcThread

entries.name: GcThread
entries.code:
GcThread {.pure, inheritable.} = object
  when emulatedThreadVars:
    tls*: ThreadLocalStorage
  else:
    nil
  when hasSharedHeap:
    next*, prev*: PGcThread
    stackBottom*, stackTop*: pointer
    stackSize*: int
  else:
    nil

entries.name: hasAllocStack
entries.code: hasAllocStack = false

entries.name: Thread
`=copy`
entries.code: proc `=copy`[TArg](x: var Thread[TArg]; y: Thread[TArg]) {.error.}
